$comment: Config for the Morphe auto-build pipeline. All apps publish to ONE rolling release (release_tag). Each build enables EVERY patch compatible with the app (app-specific + universal); list per-app exceptions in 'disable'. Each app has an ordered 'sources' list tried in turn until one resolves an APK (resilience: primary store + direct-URL fallback).
